steps.assistant_text: -O0 struct-seeder (seeds a0->[8] block fields with consts 1,0,5,2,0,3,1,4,0 then zeroes int array at 0x20 over [0,block[8])=5). -O0 code inside an -O2 file: reused REPLACE_FUNC_BODY donor-splice infra (like sibling func_00000748) — separate -O0 donor .c spliced into the -O2 tail1 object. Donor is reloc-free so 48/48 first build. Also fixed scripts/replace-function-body.py: fix_relocations only wrote shifted reloc offsets back when dropped>0, so reloc-FREE donors (dropped==0) silently discarded the downstream reloc +delta shift -> R_MIPS_26 truncation on unrelated fns; now writes back whenever (dropped or delta).
